hooks.prompt: Before stopping, check whether .context/HISTORY.md contains at least one entry dated today (format: [YYYY-MM-DD]). If work was done this session but HISTORY.md has no entry for today: respond {"ok": false, "reason": "Append a one-line entry to .context/HISTORY.md for today's work, then update the Recent Context rows in .context/ACTIVE.md with the latest 3 HISTORY entries."}. If HISTORY.md is already updated today, or if no meaningful changes were made this session, respond {"ok": true}.
